zh.lifeSummary: 當Helen of Strathearn於1322年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾布拉可福德時，她的父親Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn45歲，母親Margery Ross29歲。她於1354年10月與David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1376年在英國蘇格蘭安格斯蒙特洛斯享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helen of Strathearn于1322年出生在英国苏格兰培爾布拉可福德时，她的父亲Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn45岁，母亲Margery Ross29岁。她于1354年10月与David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1376年在英国苏格兰安格斯蒙特洛斯享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Strathearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Strathearn in Perthshire. The placename means ‘the valley of the river Earn’, from Gaelic srath ‘valley’ + the river name Earn.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Helen of Strathearn was born in 1322, in Blackford, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn, was 45 and her mother, Margery Ross, was 29. She married David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff in October 1354, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1376, in Montrose, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helen of Strathearn est née en 1322, à Blackford, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margery Ross, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff en octobre 1354, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1376, à Montrose, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helen of Strathearn 1322 in Blackford, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn 45 und ihre Mutter Margery Ross 29. Sie hat im Oktober 1354 in Schottland, United Kingdom David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1376 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Montrose, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helen of Strathearn è nata il nel 1322 nel Blackford, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Margery Ross, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff nel ottobre 1354, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1376, nel Montrose, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen of Strathearnが1322年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアブラクフォードで生まれた時，父Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearnは45歳，母Margery Rossは29歳であった。1354年10月にイギリススコットランドでDavid Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaffと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1376年にイギリススコットランドアンガスモントローゼで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen of Strathearn(이)가 1322년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 블랙퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Ross(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1354년 10월 영국 스코틀랜드에서 David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1376년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 몽로즈에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helen of Strathearn nasceu em 1322, em Blackford, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margery Ross, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff em outubro de 1354, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1376, em Montrose, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helen of Strathearn родилась в 1322 г. в местности блэккфорд, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Ross, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff октябрь 1354 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1376 г. в местности монтрос, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helen of Strathearn nació en 1322, en Blackford, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margery Ross, tenía 29 años. Se casó con David Graham Lord of Kincardine and Dunaff en octubre de 1354, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1376, en Montrose, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
